---
title: "Convergence Rates for Riemannian Proximal Bundle Methods"
date: "2025-07-15"
categories: [talks, conferences]
description: "Presented at the International Conference on Continuous Optimization (ICCOPT) at USC."
---
Presented my research on Riemannian Proximal Bundle Methods at the International Conference on Continuous Optimization (ICCOPT) held at the University of Southern California.
